name: Mathematic For Kids
description: Mathematic for Kids Train your brain and beat the clock! Solve fun math equations — addition, subtraction, multiplication and division. Choose Easy, Medium or Hard difficulty, build combo streaks and climb the leaderboard. Every correct answer adds time, every wrong one costs seconds. Can you reach the highest score? A fast, colorful and addictive math game for kids and families!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
